intent: Narrow-shell 2BR / 2 baths DISTRIBUTED, SIDE-CORRIDOR — 8x17 lot, NO CARPORT. A single hallway serves master, common bath, and standard; master (full width at the rear) reaches the hall via a small notch beside it (hall_notch_joins_master), not by the hall running the full house depth. Kitchen and great_room sit side by side at the front.
must_haves: master ensuite, master's private door is to ensuite
master's second door reaches the hall via a small notch on its right side
standard and common bath both door onto the hall
kitchen and great_room side by side at the front, no hall column between them
